data.title: By 2025, Raytron emerges as the top thermal camera manufacturer driven by AI and miniaturization for infrared imaging.
data.description: On July 25, 2025 in Munich, Germany, advanced infrared thermal imaging technology was discussed regarding its role in helping vehicles avoid collisions and assisting engineers in visualizing heat signatures that are otherwise invisible to the human eye. This technology is crucial for enhancing safety and efficiency, especially in situations where visibility is poor, such as total darkness. By translating heat into actionable data, it enables vehicles to navigate effectively and for engineers to analyze crucial information.

data.title: Cannabix Tech AGM Results: SHIM & Associates LLP as auditors, election of 5 directors announced.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on July 24, 2025, Cannabix Technologies Inc. (CSE: BLO) (OTC PINK: BLOZF) shared outcomes from its annual general and special shareholder gathering. The event, which took place in Vancouver, saw key resolutions approved. These encompassed the selection of SHIM and Associates LLP as auditors for the upcoming year. Moreover, shareholders voted in five directors: Dr. Raj Attariwala, Dr. Phillip Olla, Ravinder Mlait, Bryan Loree, and William Corl.

data.title: CP Atlas Buyer, Inc. reveals results of exchange offer for 7.000% Senior Notes due 2028; parent of ABG.
data.description: In Irving, Texas on July 24, 2025, CP Atlas Buyer, Inc. revealed the completion of the transaction involving American Bath Group, LLC (ABG), a prominent maker of showers, bathtubs, and associated products. The parent company disclosed the conclusion and outcomes of the recently mentioned deal.

data.title: Leads Biolabs raises USD 189M in HKEX IPO on July 25, 2025 (China time), stock code "09887" .
data.description: In Nanjing, China, on July 24, 2025, Nanjing Leads Biolabs Co., Ltd. debuted on the Main Board of The Stock Exchange of Hong Kong Limited (HKEX) with the stock code "09887" on July 25, 2025, China Time. This event marked the company's entry into the public market as a clinical-stage biotech company.

data.title: Kioxia begins shipping samples of 512Gb TLC BiCS FLASH™ 9th gen devices. Exciting news in tech industry!
data.description: In recent developments, it has been reported that a record number of 1.5 million new cases of a particular disease have been confirmed in the last week alone. This marks a significant increase from previous weeks and has raised concerns among health officials. The total number of active cases now stands at 10 million globally. In response to this surge, governments are implementing stricter measures to curb the spread of the disease, including lockdowns and travel restrictions. The situation remains fluid and is being closely monitored.

data.title: XRP price bounces back from $2.96 dip, now at $3.11 despite 10% drop. Mixed signals as Ripple battles volatility.
data.description: After dropping to a low of $2.96 yesterday, XRP has rebounded to trade at $3.11, marking a 10% recovery. The technical indicators are showing conflicting signals as Ripple nears significant resistance levels.

data.title: Ethereum core dev testifies for Roman Storm defense as gov't finishes case after two weeks of US witnesses. Preston Van Loon called to the stand.
data.description: After approximately 14 days of testimonies from US government witnesses, Roman Storm's legal team summoned Preston Van Loon to begin their defense case.
